titleStmt.title: SII 34.82: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 82. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Incomplete. A sum of three kāsu was gifted for three sandhi lamps by a local Brāhmaṇa. The Śivabrāhmaṇas who received the gift assured uninterrupted lamp service through a document called miṉaiyān-tīṭṭu. Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam was a brahmadēya in Viṟai-kūṟṟam of Ulaguyyavandachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Uri
maiyil ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīṉavar nilai keṭa vilavar kulaitara Ēṉai maṉṉavar riyaluṟṟaḻitara ttikkaṉaittu
ntan cakkara naṭātti vīrasiṅhāsanattu Ulakuṭaiyāḷōṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya ttribhuvanacakravattikaḷ śrī kulōttuṅ
kacōḻa devaṟkuyāṇṭu [5 10] Āvatu vaṭakarai Ulakuya vanta cōḻavaḷa nāṭṭu viṟaikūṟṟattu brahmadeyam śrīkā
maravallic caruppētimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyān tirukāṟkōṭīśvavaramuṭaiya mahādevar kōyil civabrāhmaṇar māṭilan
vaṭukan puṟam piya vaṭukan
Uṭaiyānuṭainu Ikkuṭi Arumoḻiciyān māṭilan kūttan pāṇṭanum kāttaṉāṭkoṇṭānu mivvaṉaivōmicai
ntu Ivvūr mātēviccērip puḷḷamaṅkalattu pālāśreyan vaṭukan śrīrāmanukku miḷaiya nārāyaṇanukku miḷaiya śrīkṛ
ṣṇanukku miṉaiyāntīṭṭu kuṭuttaparicāvatu Ivarkaḷ pakkal koṇṭa kācu 3 Ikkācu mūṉṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu IkkO
yilil sandhi 1- kku viḷakku 1 mūṉṟu san=tikku mūṉṟu tiruviḷakku cantrātityavat Erikka kaṭavōmā
tavumi viḷakku Erippārākavu muṭṭil panmāyēśvara kōyiṟ dhanmasabhaiyumē ṉō
Digital edition of SII 34.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
